name: prompt-optimizer
description: Scores and revises LLM prompts against a research-backed checklist. Primary focus is mitigating known failure modes on Gemma 4 31b and Gemini 3.x (including 3.5 Flash GA) via the Gemini Interactions API, and on DeepSeek V4 (V4-Pro, V4-Flash) via the DeepSeek API; also targets Claude.
